title: Delete Worlds Hotkey
description: Allows the user to press the Delete key in the World Selection list to delete a world
body: Allows the user to press the Delete key in the World Selection list to delete a world. You may have to unfocus the search bar when first opening the list depending on the Minecraft version. It has been designed specifically to be able to hold down the button, but it can be pretty slow with >500 worlds or so. Bypasses the typical confirmation pop-up.
